\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{totalTransferMatrix()}{totalTransferMatrix()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classLayeredMediaUtils_a796d55e02d56c610cae065557bc64c10} 
std\+::vector$<$ std\+::vector$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}} $>$ $>$ Layered\+Media\+Utils\+::total\+Transfer\+Matrix (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}}]{krho}{, }\item[{const std\+::string \&}]{waves}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption}) const}



Computes the total transfer matrix for the entire layered structure. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em krho} & Transverse wavenumber. \\
\hline
{\em waves} & Type of wave polarization ("{}\+TE"{} or "{}\+TM"{}). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
A 2x2 matrix representing the total transfer matrix of the layered medium. 
\end{DoxyReturn}

\begin{DoxyExceptions}{Exceptions}
{\em std\+::invalid\+\_\+argument} & if an invalid wave type is provided.\\
\hline
\end{DoxyExceptions}
This function calculates the cumulative transfer matrix by iteratively multiplying the propagation matrices and interface transfer matrices for all layers in the structure.
